heading: Registration of aircraft components and dealers’ certificates of registration
label: 44104 Registration of aircraft components and dealers’ certificates of registration
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)44104(1)49 App.:1402., , §§ 502, 505 (1st sentence), , 774.Aug. 23, 1958Pub. L. 85–72672 Stat. 77249 App.:1655(c)(1)., , ; , , .Oct. 15, 1966Jan. 12, 1983Pub. L. 89–670, § 6(c)(1)80 Stat. 938Pub. L. 97–449, § 7(b)96 Stat. 244444104(2)49 App.:1405 (1st sentence).49 App.:1655(c)(1).In this section, before clause (1), the words “prescribe regulations” are substituted for “establish reasonable rules and regulations” in 49 App.:1402 and “by such reasonable regulations” in 49 App.:1405 (1st sentence) because of 49:322(a). In clause (1), the words “and no aircraft engine, propeller, or appliance shall be used in violation of any such rule or regulation” are omitted as surplus because of section 46301 of the revised title. In clause (2), the words “in connection with” are omitted as surplus.

L. 97–449, § 7(b)96 Stat. 244444104(2)49 App.:1405 (1st sentence).49 App.:1655(c)(1).In this section, before clause (1), the words “prescribe regulations” are substituted for “establish reasonable rules and regulations” in 49 App.:1402 and “by such reasonable regulations” in 49 App.:1405 (1st sentence) because of 49:322(a). In clause (1), the words “and no aircraft engine, propeller, or appliance shall be used in violation of any such rule or regulation” are omitted as surplus because of section 46301 of the revised title. children.text: in the interest of safety for registering and identifying an aircraft engine, propeller, or appliance; and
in the public interest for issuing, suspending, and revoking a dealer’s certificate of registration under this chapter and for its use by a person manufacturing, distributing, or selling aircraft.
